title: Investigate null spike in warehouse.orders.payment_status
summary: The incident suggests a recent upstream change or bad backfill introduced unexpected null values.
recommended_action: Pause downstream consumption, inspect recent ingestion/backfill jobs, and validate whether nulls should be backfilled from the payment provider source.
rollback_plan: If a bad backfill is confirmed, restore affected rows from the latest verified snapshot after checking for intervening updates.
